autoQuery.title: Auto Query
autoQuery.description: Automatically query price data every 30 minutes (on the hour and half-hour)

priceAbove.title: Price Rise Alert
priceAbove.description: Send notification when price rises to the set value

priceBelow.title: Price Drop Alert
priceBelow.description: Send notification when price drops to the set value

dailyDropPercent.title: Daily Drop Alert
dailyDropPercent.description: Send notification when price drops more than the set percentage from daily high

changePercent.title: Change Percent Alert
changePercent.description: Send notification when price changes more than the set percentage from last query

hint.title: 💡Usage Tips
hint.description: The plugin adds a 📈 button to the top bar. Click to view historical data and price trends. Supports multiple API configurations and four types of alerts.

reset.title: Reset Settings
reset.description: Reset all settings to default values
reset.label: Reset
reset.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to default values? This action cannot be undone, and historical data will also be cleared.
reset.message: All settings have been reset to default values
